lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you doing out here on your own?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I'm not alone! Me and my mates run these streets. You'd better watch your pockets, stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean you run the streets?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: You see those fancy houses?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think so?

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: We keep a lookout to see when the owners leave and come back. Once they're out, we can break in and steal all their stuff!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That sounds risky don't you think? There are guards everywhere.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: No one suspects us street urchins. Hidden in plain sight, as they say.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: I can give you some info on which houses are free if you like...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: You're new around here. Normally I'd charge 15 valuables for information, but I'm feeling generous.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Looks like [Wealthy citizen name] isn't home right now. Go quickly!

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Do you want me to point you in the right direction?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: His house is south of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm alright for now.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Hello. Have you met our crew leader yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I have...

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Go chat to them! They should be near the bank... naturally.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll head over there soon.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: Happy thieving, stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I could do with some information on houses.

lines.speaker: Ava
lines.text: You don't have any house keys, do you? You won't find yourself getting very far without any. Maybe come back later?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd better get going.
